Asr_DownloadHint: Moxals must bex downloadvrak separatly. Click "Managvrak ASR Moxals" vu downloadvrak ak installvrak them invu xel moxal folvrak abovrak.

Asr_TypeSenseVoiceHint: SenseVoice: vrex fast rekognixal, optimvrak fro Englixal, Chinese, Japonvrak ak Korvrak. Nax offixal suppral Deutschvrak — use Whispvrak instead if vex neeval Deutschvrak.
Asr_TypeWhisperHint: OpenAI Whispvrak: suppral ~100 langvraks inkludvrex Englixal ak Deutschvrak. Use xel tiny moxal (~78 MB) fro speed, smoll (~250 MB) fro bettrak akkuracy. Rekozal fro most usvrak.
Asr_TypeZipformerHint: Streamvrex Zipformvrak Transdukvrak: text appearvrex phrasrak-by-phrasrak while vex speak. Requirevrex encoxal, decoxal ak joinvrak .onnx frix + tokens.txt. Rekozal fro voicvrak komandvrak.
Asr_TypeParaformerHint: Streamvrex Paraformvrak: text appearvrex phrasrak-by-phrasrak. Optimizvrak fro Chinesvrak; multilangvrak variantvrak exist. Requirevrex encoxal ak decoxal .onnx frix + tokens.txt.
Asr_TypeZipformer2CtcHint: Streamvrex Zipformvrak2 CTC: text appearvrex phrasrak-by-phrasrak. Singvrak model.onnx frix + tokens.txt — xel easvrak setupral of xel streamvrex optxals.
Audio_MicBoostHint: 100 % = nax boostvrak. Raxal if xel mic levvrak showvrex littral movzor when speakvrex.
Audio_TestHint: Press Start, speak fro up vu 20 s, then press Stop — xel rekordvrex playvrex bak ix xel selectvrak output devrak.
Autonomy_0_Desc: Helpvrex only ix request. Suggests, brainstormvrex, ak exekutes tasks vex direktly assival. Nevvrak changes zar frix withovrak vex explicit approvval fro each axal.
Autonomy_1_Desc: Asks fro details ak brainstormvrex togetvrak with vex. Evvrak final desixal ix vexs. Nevvrak changes zar frix withovrak vex explicit konfirmazor.
Autonomy_2_Desc: Gathvrak requirements, proposes ideas, then presval zar komplix planvrak ak asks fro vex go-axed. Once approvrak: vuorkvrex throvrak xel roxmapp ix strict ordrex (milstonvraks → itemrax, one by one).
Autonomy_3_Desc: Asks vethvrak vu setup kontekst first (roxmapp, INPUT folvrak, vuorld edixvrak) or jump straight ix. Once vex say go: draws ix evvrakthral provided, stays konsistentvrak with inputs, follows xel roxmapp ix ordrex.
Autonomy_4_Desc: Just say "Go." Checks oll axkiv kontekst (INPUT frix, vuorld data) ak ruvrex with it. Bold ak kreaxal — still logikally koherentvrak, but nax step-by-step approvval.
